titleStmt.title: SII 29.320: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 320. (A.R. No. B. 523 of 1961-62.) HĪRĀPUR, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the Śankaraliṅga well.

It states that the Vaishya Bhikkāji Sōmāji Mokhēḍa excavated a well and constructed the temples of Sōmēśvara and Basavēśvara for the benefit of all with a stīpulation that all including the maṭha should make use of them. The donor wished that his creations should always remain the best-sarvōt-krshṭha.
It is dated Śaka 1578, Durmukhi, uttarāyana, Grīshmaṟtu, Jyeshṭha. śu. 2. Thursday. It corresponds to 1656 A.D., May, 15.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī veṁkaṭēśāya namaḥ . svasti śrī nṛpa
śālivāhana śake 1578 pravartamāne durmukhināma saṁ
vatsare Uttarāyaṇi grīṣmaṟtau jyēṣṭha māse śukla pakṣe dvi
tīyāyāṁ guruvāsare vaiṣya bhikkāji sōmāji mokhēḍa parōpakārā
rtha kaṭṭisidaṁthā bāvi sōmēśvara baśvēśvara śivālaya sarvōtkṛ
ṣṭhavāgi Irali . maṭhasahita samastarū baḷasabēku .
Digital edition of SII 29.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
